entries.name: Smoochum
entries.label: Eggs — Saturday — Normal
entries.source_text: Feeling the heat—and the chill? Fire and Ice Hatch Day features Smoochum and Magby hatching much more frequently from 2 km Eggs, with an increased chance of hatching Shiny Smoochum and Shiny Magby! The Fire and Ice Hatch Day event will take place on August 8, 2026 from 11 am to 5 pm.
